species: the role of SIRT3 in regulating human stem cell homeostasis remains unclear.
tissue: SIRT3 expression was downregulated in senescent human mesenchymal stem cells (hMSCs).

sample_source: SIRT3 expression was downregulated in senescent human mesenchymal stem cells (hMSCs).
age: primary hMSCs were isolated from an old individual (76 years old).
cell_line: To explore a potential geroprotective role of SIRT3 in hMSCs, we knocked out SIRT3 in hESCs using CRISPR/Cas9-based gene editing.
sex: injected subcutaneously into the inguinal region of NOD/SCID mice (male, 6 weeks old).
